description: Current problem after fz-rh2.11.7.16: tests/fz2_cli.rs build_executes_map_struct_and_bitstring_fixtures and run_and_interp_execute_map_struct_and_bitstring_fixtures fail on fixtures/utf8_smart_constructor/input.fz. Direct reproduction: fz2 run fixtures/utf8_smart_constructor/input.fz emits 'error[internal/post-resolution-leftover]: quoted surface read failed: invalid any value ref: ExpectedTag { expected: ValueKind(1), found: ValueKind(3) }'. fixtures/defstruct_runtime/input.fz now passes, so the old unresolved Point title was stale. The fixture begins with 'import Utf8, only: [valid?: 1]', which points at quoted frontdoor/surface handling of keyword-list entries whose atom keys contain punctuation. Goal: make compiler2 quoted source preserve and read keyword keys such as valid? in import/only lists so the fz2 map/struct/bitstring fixture legs can go green.
title: Compiler2 front door: quote keyword keys with punctuation
